product.name: ArDura 500 C Neo
product.familyDescriptorPl: Tkaniny PA 6.6 — warianty powlekane, FR i wzmocnione
product.familyDescriptorEn: PA 6.6 fabrics — coated, FR and reinforced variants
product.categorySourceGroup: Woven PA.6.6 fabrics for police uniforms, motorcyclists, bomb disposal suits and technical military applications.
product.titleDescriptor: Pa6.6 woven high visible fabric for Police and Gendarme wear
product.specLine: 215 g/m², 100% Pa 6.6, Water Repellent, Antibacterial, High Visible Woven Fabric
descriptions: ArDura 500 C Neo is lightweight high visible 100% polyamide 6.6 woven fabric for military, police and gendarme wear. It is suitable for mobile motobikers police wear.
The Pa6.6 high tenacity fibers gives for extra protection for polices.
The fabric has water and oil repellent function.
It's used mostly for application which requires ultra durability.
The antibacterial function is very usefull to eliminate all kind of odor formation during work.
Pa6.6 woven high visible fabric for Police and Gendarme wear
215 g/m², 100% Pa 6.6, Water Repellent, Antibacterial, High Visible Woven Fabric
technicalParameters: Tensile Strength | Warp>2500N; Weft>2000N | EN ISO 13934-1
Tear Strength | Warp>150N; Weft>120N | EN ISO 13937-2
Dimensional Change | -3% < Length < +3% ; -3% < Width < +3% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants | EN ISO 14362-1
Allergenic Dyestuffs | Not Detected | EN ISO 14362-1

evidence: titleDescriptor: 'Pa6.6 woven high visible fabric for Police and Gendarme wear'
acceptedMatches.rationale: Explicit high-visibility certification (EN ISO 20471) and product framed as high-visible fabric.

evidence: categorySourceGroup: 'Woven PA.6.6 fabrics for police uniforms, motorcyclists, bomb disposal suits and technical military applications.'
descriptions: 'ArDura 500 C Neo is lightweight high visible 100% polyamide 6.6 woven fabric for military, police and gendarme wear.'
acceptedMatches.rationale: Explicit statement of military, police and gendarme wear use.

evidence: descriptions: 'It is suitable for mobile motobikers police wear.'
acceptedMatches.rationale: Explicit statement of use for motorcyclist police wear.

possibleButNotAccepted.reason: Antibacterial property mentioned but no explicit medical/healthcare use stated.

titleDescriptor: 'Pa6.6 woven high visible fabric for Police and Gendarme wear'
primary.rationale: Product is explicitly framed for military, police and gendarme uniform use, making this the dominant and most direct commercial application.

secondary.rationale: The fabric is explicitly certified as high-visibility per EN ISO 20471, an independently supported secondary use for warning garments.

alternativesConsidered.reasonNotSelected: Motorcycle police wear is mentioned but is a sub-context of the police/military use rather than an independent commercial sector, and is less specific than the explicit military/police framing.
Antibacterial property is present but no medical or healthcare use is stated.
Product is explicitly tied to police/military/gendarme use, which is more specific than generic industrial workwear.
